title: EU Designates IRGC as Terrorist Organization
detail: EU foreign ministers unanimously vote to designate Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organization, following France's shift to support the measure on January 28. The European Council also sanctions 15 individuals and 6 entities for human rights violations, including Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni. Iran denounces the designation as 'selective outrage' and warns of 'hazardous consequences.'

title: Trump Presented with Expanded Military Options
detail: Reports emerge that President Trump has been presented with additional military plans targeting Iran, including possible commando operations against nuclear facilities. The briefings follow the arrival of the Lincoln CSG and fighter deployments to Jordan. Pentagon officials decline to comment on specific operational planning, but note 'all options remain on the table.'

title: IRGC Conducts Missile Readiness Exercises
detail: Iranian state media reports that the IRGC has conducted limited military exercises emphasizing missile capabilities and rapid-deployment forces. Satellite imagery shows the movement of mobile missile launchers and increased aircraft dispersal at military airfields, measures typically associated with reducing vulnerability to preemptive strikes. Iran frames the drills as routine defensive measures.
